text: A train on a track parked at a station.
A batter swinging his bat and making a face.
A dog sleeps on a round bed in front of a fire place of a living area.
Man in a batting cage at night, just having swung the bat.
A teary eyed baby is holding a toothbrush.
A magazine with two children sitting on a box, one holding a cell phone.
Friends in wetsuits surfing in a calm ocean
A historical locomotive sits on a track beside of a more modern type train.
Outdoor seating service area features red chairs and brick patio.
A group of people are drinking wine together.
